assessment_objectives.objective: conditions requiring a user session to terminate are defined.
conditions or trigger events that require session disconnect are defined.
a user session is automatically terminated after any of the defined conditions occur.
the time period of expected inactivity requiring users to log out of the system is defined.
circumstances requiring users to log out of the system are defined.
users are required to log out of the system after <A.03.01.01.ODP[05]: time period> of expected inactivity or when the following circumstances occur: <A.03.01.01.ODP[06]: circumstances>.
assessment_objectives.scf_defined_parameters:
SDP values:
[05] - at most 24 hours
[06] - the work period ends, for privileged users at a minimum

assessment_objectives.objective: session connections are terminated when nonlocal maintenance is completed.
a user session is terminated automatically after <A.03.01.11.ODP[01]: conditions or trigger events>.
assessment_objectives.scf_defined_parameters: a specified duration (maximum of 24 hours) of inactivity, misbehavior (end the session due to an attempted policy violation), and maintenance (terminate sessions to prevent issues with an upgrade or service outage)
